title: Mission to Nar Shaddaa (disambiguation)
content:
There were a number of specific '''missions to [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]''' during the [[Timeline of galactic history/Legends|history]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==Canon==
===Galactic Civil War===
*[[Rescue of Luke Skywalker]] - A mission undertaken by [[Han Solo]] and [[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Leia Organa]] to rescue [[Luke Skywalker]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin]].
*[[Mission to Nar Shaddaa (War of the Bounty Hunters)]] - A mission undertaken by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and two [[bounty hunter]]s, [[Beilert Valance]] and [[Dengar]], to gain information on [[Boba Fett]].

==Legends==
===Old Republic===
*A [[Hero of Tython|young Jedi Knight's]] [[Mission to Nar Shaddaa (Desolator crisis)|mission]] during the [[Desolator crisis]].
*[[Meetra Surik]]'s [[Mission to Nar Shaddaa (First Jedi Purge)|mission]] during the [[First Jedi Purge]], part of her attempt to track down the [[Lost Jedi]] and to stop the [[Sith Triumvirate]].
*[[Mandalore the Avenger|Shae Vizla]]'s [[Mission to Nar Shaddaa (Mandalore the Avenger)|mission]] during the [[Third Galactic War]]
*A [[Mission to Nar Shaddaa (32 BBY)|mission]] undertaken in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] by [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]].

===Clone Wars===
*[[Mission to Nar Shaddaa (Clone Wars)]] – apart of [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos's]] attempt to infiltrate the inner circle of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], [[22 BBY/Legends|21.5 BBY]]

===Imperial Period===
*[[Mission to Nar Shaddaa (Galen Marek)|Mission to Nar Shaddaa]] – A mission conducted by [[Galen Marek]] to locate [[Rahm Kota/Legends|Rahm Kota]] at [[The Undertow]] on [[Nar Shaddaa]] in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]].

===Galactic Civil War===
Special agent [[Kyle Katarn]] went on several missions to Nar Shaddaa on behalf of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]:
*[[Mission to Nar Shaddaa (Dark Trooper campaign)]] – Katarn's effort to steal a [[nava card]] detailing [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] involved the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Dark Trooper Project]], [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]
*[[Mission to Nar Shaddaa (5 ABY)|Mission to Nar Shaddaa]] – Katarn's later attempt to discern the details of his [[Morgan Katarn|father's]] death from the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[8t88/Legends|8t88]], [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]
*[[Mission to Nar Shaddaa (Empire Reborn)]] – Katarn's personal war against the [[Empire Reborn]], [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]
*[[Mission to Nar Shaddaa (Disciples of Ragnos crisis)]], carried out by the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]]
{{Disambig}}
